name: Event Manager
description: Full-featured event management: public/private events, modals for admin, robust file handling, KPIs, and secure downloads.

changes: Maintenance release — upload event_manager_module_v0.0.4.zip before clients update.
Complete release package — upload full event_manager_module_v0.0.3.zip to the repository before clients update.
Smart sitemap signposting: declares public sitemap endpoint for aggregation into the website module sitemap index.
Adds public section discovery metadata for /llms.txt and human/AI navigation (public_sections + public_sitemaps).
Compatibility alignment with core/website module update system conventions (factory current_version + API download_url).
Initial release of Event Manager module.
Single-page admin dashboard with all actions as modals (view, edit, create, delete).
File upload/download for menu and flyer (robust, filename-only storage, secure serving).
Public/private event support, KPIs for upcoming/public/menu events.
Search, category/music type filtering, dynamic fields for 'Other' options.
Bug fixes: no path traversal, correct file serving, browser-compatible time fields.
